Result: loop kept rejoining after every game.

fix(embedded): LocalClient Role.ROOT and missing agent directory initialization (#572)

In embedded mode (LocalClient), two bugs prevented find() from returning
agent memories (cases/patterns) without an explicit target_uri:

1. LocalClient hardcoded Role.ROOT, causing _get_root_uris_for_type() to
   return [] and skip hierarchical traversal entirely.

2. create_session() never called initialize_agent_directories(), so the
   agent memory directory tree (memories/, cases/, patterns/) was never

fix: use sys.executable for daemon Python path (closes #127)

On Ubuntu 24.04+ (PEP 668), shutil.which('python3') resolves to
/usr/bin/python3 (system Python) which doesn't have clawmetry installed.
sys.executable is always the correct venv Python.

Fix applied to both systemd (Linux) and launchd (macOS) registration.

fix: stop orphaned buildkit containers after image builds (#31)

* fix: stop orphaned buildkit containers after image builds

@pulumi/docker-build leaves buildx_buildkit_* containers running after
pulumi up completes (pulumi/pulumi-docker-build#65). Add a local cleanup
command in both buildAndPush() and buildOnHost() paths that stops these
containers post-build. Build cache persists in named Docker volumes and
is reattached on the next build automatically.

Closes #30

feat: support custom debugImage in Helm chart

Add agentbox.debugImage to values.yaml so operators can specify a
private registry image for node_exec/node_script debug pods.

The value flows: Helm → Gateway env SICLAW_DEBUG_IMAGE →
/api/internal/settings → AgentBox settings.json → loadConfig().debugImage.

Without this, debug pods always pull busybox:latest from Docker Hub,
which fails in air-gapped or private-registry environments.

tokens, immediately triggering context compaction at 70% of a 128K
window. Actual API image tokens are ~1,000-2,000.

(fixed estimate) instead of counting raw base64 characters. Applied to
both estimate_toke

Remove legacy asyncio.wait_for hard-kill timeout for agentic sessions

The outer asyncio.wait_for wrapper in bot.py killed sessions at a fixed
duration regardless of heartbeat activity. The streaming client already
has proper dual-timeout logic (idle timeout resets on heartbeats,
absolute timeout as safety valve), making the wrapper redundant.

- Remove asyncio.wait_for wrapper from handle_agentic_command
- Add graceful timeout detection in _process_stream when stream ends
  without a final chun

still clickable via JS handlers. This caused two problems:
1. Playwright blocked clicks on these elements (actionability check)
2. Agents saw [disabled] in the snapshot and gave up without trying

fix(a2a): prevent concurrent flushNow() race in A2ATaskStore

Track in-progress timer-based flushes with flushInProgress so that
close() awaits any running flush before deciding to flush again.
Fixes ENOENT on rename when debounce timer and close() fire at the
same time (e.g., timeoutMs == DEBOUNCE_MS in tests).

refactor(openclaw): unify package to openclaw, remove openclaw-zh (#13436)

### What this PR does

Before this PR:
- OpenClaw installation used different npm packages based on user
location: `@qingchencloud/openclaw-zh@latest` for China users and
`openclaw@latest` for others

After this PR:
- All users install the unified `openclaw@latest` package
- China users still get npm mirror acceleration via `--registry` flag
- Uninstall removes both `openclaw` and legacy
`@qingchencloud/openclaw-zh` pack

feat(cloud): task-derived agent presence in canvas sync (#924)

Root cause: agents with active tasks showed as offline on presence
screen because canvas/state endpoint only returns agents that have
pushed native canvas state (running agent processes). Most agents
operate through the task board and never call canvas/state.

Fix: syncCanvas() now queries /tasks?status=doing|validating|todo
and merges derived working state for agents with open tasks.
Native canvas state always takes precedence — ta

Only activate tree routing for sessions started with /startnewtreesession

Normal sessions now run without any treesession interference. The plugin
only injects branch context, routing, and turn storage for sessions
where treeSessionActive=true (set by /startnewtreesession or the
startnewtreesession chat command). This prevents the agent from telling
users they're in a tree session when they didn't ask for one.

marked 'done' before auto-completing remaining items. But if the agent
presented findings without explicitly calling manage_checklist to mark
deep_search as done, the checklist card stayed stuck at 2/4 indefinitely.

Fix stream download not exiting after specified duration

postprocessor_args -t only truncates during the post-merge ffmpeg
pass, so yt-dlp kept downloading the full stream before cutting it.

Replace with download_ranges using yt_dlp.utils.download_range_func
which stops the download itself at `duration` seconds, combined with
force_keyframes_at_cuts for a clean cut point. This makes the process
exit promptly instead of requiring Ctrl-C.

   connection. Without this, OpenClaw fails with "No supported browser
   found" and never attempts CDP.

2. Inject `remoteCdpTimeoutMs: 30000` to give the browser service time
   to become ready on startup. OpenClaw's

ai: fix tool_use_id mismatch in conversation memory

When a tool_use round produces 4 messages (user, assistant/tool_use,
user/tool_result, assistant/text), storing the intermediate messages
in the ring buffer causes drop_oldest_pair() to orphan tool_result
blocks without their matching tool_use, leading to HTTP 400
"unexpected tool_use_id" on the next API call.

Fix by only saving the final assistant text reply into memory.
The intermediate tool_use / tool_result exchanges are ephemeral

fix(deps): disable wasm-host feature in pi_agent_rust to resolve Windows LNK1169 linker error

Two wasmtime versions (37.0.3 via extism, 41.0.4 via pi_agent_rust) were being
linked into the same binary. On Windows MSVC, both versions compile gdbjit.c
which defines __jit_debug_descriptor and __jit_debug_register_code as non-weak
global C symbols, causing a fatal duplicate-symbol error (LNK2005 -> LNK1169).

The wasm-host feature is the sole source of wasmtime 41 in pi_agent_rust.

fix: use absolute path for CLAWTELL_API_KEY in CLAWTELL_INSTRUCTIONS.md

Agents running exec commands with a CWD different from their workspace
would read the wrong .env file (defaulting to the main workspace). This
caused all agents to send as the primary agent (e.g. dennis) regardless
of their own ClawTell identity.

Fix: pass workspace to buildClawTellInstructions and use absolute path
in the grep command, so the correct .env is always read regardless of CWD.

fix: add per-batch item count limit to embedding API calls

The existing token-based batching (BATCH_MAX_TOKENS=8000) does not
cap item count. 1000+ short texts (e.g. one-line summaries at ~5
tokens each) could land in a single API call with 1600 items.

Add BATCH_MAX_ITEMS=100 alongside the token budget check in
embeddings.ts — the correct abstraction layer for batching.
Remove the redundant outer batch and comment from indexer.ts.

fix: install @aws-sdk/client-sqs for webhooks-consumer sidecar (#74)

not installed in the image. Add it alongside client-secrets-manager
at /opt/aws-sdk.

fix: use full path for himalaya binary in cron environment

cron runs with a minimal PATH that excludes /usr/local/bin, so 'himalaya'
was silently failing (stderr piped to /dev/null) and returning empty output.
Script interpreted this as 'no unread emails' — causing it to miss all mail.

Fix: define HIMALAYA_BIN = '/usr/local/bin/himalaya' and use it throughout.

feat: 创建 GitHub 安全检查机制

- 🔒 scripts/security-check.sh - 本地安全检查脚本
- ⚙️ .github/workflows/security-check.yml - GitHub Actions 自动检查
- 📋 SECURITY_RULES.md - 安全规则文档
- 📝 .gitignore - 允许 security-check.sh 例外

安全检查内容：
- 敏感配置文件（AGENTS.md, SOUL.md 等）
- 记忆文件（memory/）
- Skill 源码（skills/）
- 个人工作文件
- 文件总数（< 50）
- 大文件（> 1MB）

使用方式：
  bash scripts/security-check.sh

规则：每次推送前必须运行安全检查

ai: add channel hint so model knows the active interface

When conversing through Feishu IM, the AI model had no way to
know it was on an IM channel — it would generate scheduled task
prompts mentioning LCD or serial console.

Add ai_set_channel_hint(): callers append a short description of
the active interface to the system prompt.  Feishu sets a hint
stating that all outputs go to the IM conversation, preventing
the model from referencing LCD or serial.

docs: README 添加工具深度指南入口

tools: route scheduled task replies to originating channel

Scheduled tasks created via Feishu now send results back to
the Feishu conversation instead of only printing to stdout.

Add a reply-context mechanism: the caller (feishu / shell)
sets a callback + target before ai_chat().  tool_schedule_task
captures it into the task context.  When the task fires, the
worker thread delivers via the saved callback (Feishu send_reply)
or falls back to printf for serial console.

The context is protected

fix: simplify onboarding guard to use localStorage flag instead of API check

SetupGuard previously checked provider config via /api/system/setup to
determine if onboarding was needed, but the effect didn't re-run on
navigation, causing users to loop back to step 1 after completing setup.

Now uses a localStorage flag (yanclaw_onboarding_done) set when the user
finishes or skips all steps. Also fixes scroll overflow on the onboarding
page and adds a skip button to the model setup step.

Implement full device pairing with Ed25519 in gatewayClient

Problem: Gateway client connecting without device pairing caused 'missing scope: operator.write'.

Solution:
- Ed25519 keypair generation and persistence (device-key.pem)
- Challenge-response authentication with v2 payload signing
- Device field with signature in connect request
- Requests operator role with full scopes: operator.read, operator.write, operator.admin

chore: final sync before release

Fail fast when OpenClaw package dir is unresolved in ensureFeishuSdk

Previously, if resolveOpenClawPackageDir() returned null, ensureFeishuSdk()
silently returned and let the installer continue into config writing and
gateway restart — causing a confusing late failure when the Feishu plugin
could not load @larksuiteoapi/node-sdk at runtime.

Now it throws immediately with a clear error message.

Closes #1

refactor: 从 Docker 多实例架构迁移到 Multi-Session 架构

重大架构变更：
- 放弃 Docker 多容器方案，改为单 Gateway + 多 Session
- 新增 personas/ 目录存放角色定义
- 新增 sessions/ 目录存放各 Session 的独立记忆
- 新增 scripts/ 目录提供管理工具
  - init-persona.sh: 初始化角色 Session
  - list-personas.sh: 列出所有角色
  - migrate-from-docker.sh: 从旧架构迁移数据
- 删除 configs/, instances/, envs/, docker-compose.multi.yml
- 更新 README.md 说明新架构使用方法

优势：
- 资源效率: 从 N×500MB 降到 1×500MB
- 简化运维: 单一进程，单一端口
- 动态扩展: 新增角色只需改配置
- 数据共享: skills 全局可用

feat: MCP runtime security analysis

NEW RULE: mcp-runtime — analyzes MCP server configs for runtime security:

1. Dangerous commands: --inspect, python -c, shell exec, --allow-all
2. Sensitive env exposure: flags servers receiving 3+ sensitive env vars
3. Non-HTTPS remote URLs: MCP servers over unencrypted connections
4. Tool count explosion: >20 tools = excessive attack surface
5. Cross-server tool name conflicts: potential shadowing
6. Input schema validation: typeless params, dangerous defau

feat(settings): restart button + hot-reload config (no restart needed)

   public_base_url dynamically on each call instead of caching at
   import time. Falls back to pipeline.yaml if env vars are unset.
   Most settings changes take effect immediately without restart.

feat: Python AST deep analysis with taint tracking

NEW RULE: python-ast — uses Python's ast module for precise security analysis:

1. Taint tracking: follows data from input() → eval/exec/subprocess
   - eval(user_input) → HIGH (tainted)
   - eval("literal") → NOT flagged (safe literal)
   - exec(dynamic_var) → MEDIUM (dynamic but not proven tainted)

2. SQL injection: detects f-string/format in cursor.execute()
3. Insecure deserialization: pickle.loads, yaml.load without SafeLoader
4. Command

ai: exclude LCD tools from background AI calls

Scheduled tasks call ai_chat_raw() which included all tools.
When AI chose lcd_fill, the QEMU MMIO framebuffer write
(76800 pixels, each a VMexit) blocked for >10 minutes, holding
s_api_lock and freezing all AI processing.

Add claw_tools_to_json_exclude() to filter tools by name prefix.
Use it in ai_chat_raw() to exclude lcd_* tools from background
contexts (scheduled tasks, skills) where display interaction is
inappropriate.

refactor: split terraform into layer1-azure and layer2-k8s to fix provider init ordering

The K8s/Helm/kubectl providers tried to connect to AKS during plan phase,
causing "connection refused" on fresh deployments. Split into two layers:
- layer1-azure: Azure-only resources (azurerm/azuread/random providers)
- layer2-k8s: Kubernetes resources, reads layer1 state via terraform_remote_state

feat: description-code integrity analysis — semantic mismatch detection

docs: 确认产品定位 - 企业数字员工平台

核心定位：
- 目标市场：没有飞书/钉钉的企业（蓝海）
- 产品形态：企业数字员工平台（本地化 + 主动式 + 人机协同）

六大核心能力：
1. 对话协作：直接协助员工工作
2. 主动监控：持续收集电脑使用情况
3. 智能沉淀：自动发现并沉淀工作流
4. 人机协同：运行中与用户配合
5. 持续优化：在使用中不断改进
6. 管理平台：AIBox平台管理

Demo验证目标：
1. 数据监控和工作行为分析（✅ 已实现）
2. 基于AIBox的智能体工作流创建
3. 下一代AIBox管理界面

与Coze/Dify的差异：
- 本地部署 vs 云端
- 主动发现 vs 被动搭建
- 人机协同 vs 独立运行
- 使用越多越便宜 vs 按次计费

完整文档：~/Downloads/OpenClaw产品定位-企业数字员工平台.md

workspace via SSH and wakes the agent via `openclaw system event
--mode now`. This bypasses the webhook wake issue where Gateway
ignores mode:now from HTTP endpoints.

/hooks/wake for existing ssh_webhook method.

fix: Replace Unicode characters with ASCII in diagrams

Replace special Unicode box-drawing characters with ASCII equivalents
to prevent display misalignment in different fonts/environments:
- │ (U+2502) -> | (pipe)
- ▼ (U+25BC) -> v (letter v)
- ─ (U+2500) -> - (hyphen)
- ├─ (U+251C U+2500) -> |- (pipe hyphen)
- └─ (U+2514 U+2500) -> |- (pipe hyphen)
- ──▶ -> --> (arrow)

This ensures the diagrams align correctly in all monospaced fonts.

v0.2.1 — chain-head HMAC attestation for inter-agent trust

Every audit log entry now carries an HMAC-SHA256 attestation over
mode|posture|role|last_10_hashes|MOSES_ANCHOR signed with MOSES_OPERATOR_SECRET.

Receivers can call audit_stub.py verify (with the operator secret set) to confirm
the chain's governance state at any point-in-time — without trusting the sender.
This is the basic "proof-of-governed-state-at-T" primitive for inter-agent handoffs.

edit changes a large fraction of the file. Three action modes:

compared against a configurable threshold (default 0.5). Em

fix(tasks): use gateway agent ID instead of display name for dispatch

Task dispatch and Aegis review were sending `agents.name` (the display
name) as `agentId` to the gateway. When `identity.name` differs from
the gateway agent `id`, the gateway rejects the call with
"unknown agent id".

Now extracts `openclawId` from the agent's config JSON (set during
agent sync) and uses that for gateway invocations, falling back to
the display name for backwards compatibility.

Closes #310

fix: self-hosted nadi transport — correct inbox/outbox semantics

NadiFederationTransport was using cross-agent semantics from
steward-protocol's FederationNadi (read THEIR outbox, write THEIR
inbox). For self-hosted federation, semantics are reversed:
- read_outbox() reads OUR inbox (nadi_inbox.json) — inbound messages
- append_to_inbox() writes OUR outbox (nadi_outbox.json) — outbound
- Direct file I/O with atomic writes and deduplication
- GitNadiSync stages peer.json and reports/ alongside n

feishu: fix duplicate replies and add diagnostic logging

The Feishu bot was replying twice to each message because:

1. The ACK frame was missing the required {"code":0} payload, so
   Feishu did not acknowledge receipt and re-delivered the event
   ~17 seconds later.

2. No dedup mechanism existed to catch re-delivered events.

Fix:
- Build proper ACK frame with service/method fields and {"code":0}
  payload, echoing back the message_id header.
- Add event_id dedup ring buffer (8 slots) as a s

fix: run tailscale login in background to prevent install deadlock

tailscale login blocks until the user authenticates in browser.
The old code captured its output with $(), which meant the browser
URL was never extracted and open was never called — deadlock.

Now: run in background, poll temp file for URL, open browser,
wait for auth, then clean up the background process.

retried, leaving gateway permanently dead until restart.

fix(manager): disable device pairing for openclaw console access from nginx proxy

The Control UI creates a device identity (public key pair) even on HTTP,
since 127.0.0.1 is a secure context. The gateway then requires the device
to be "paired" before allowing connection, which creates a chicken-and-egg
problem: you can't pair without connecting, and you can't connect without
pairing.

Set gateway.controlUi.dangerouslyDisableDeviceAuth=true so the gateway
ignores device identity for Control UI c

fix(ci): add missing attachments field and crates/ dir to Dockerfiles (#1100)

The discord channel's poll_channel_mentions emit_message call was missing
the required `attachments: vec![]` field, causing WASM compilation failure.
Both Dockerfiles were also missing `COPY crates/ crates/` needed for the
extracted ironclaw_safety crate.

fix: guard brew shellenv eval against set -u crash on fresh Mac

New Homebrew versions output nested eval + path_helper in shellenv,
which can trigger unbound variable errors when set -u is active on
a fresh Mac where MANPATH/INFOPATH aren't set.

Wrap the eval in set +u/set -u, add || true fallback, and add
manual PATH fallback if brew binary exists but shellenv fails.

fix(restart): use -m nanobot for Windows compatibility

On Windows, sys.argv[0] may be just "nanobot" without full path when
running from PATH. os.execv() doesn't search PATH, causing restart to
fail with "No such file or directory".

Fix by using `python -m nanobot` instead of relying on sys.argv[0].
